meta.description: A spring map that knows where water is flowing right now. Official CHMI measurements, refreshed nightly. Free, no account, no ads.

mock.mapAria: Preview of the Studánky map screen
mock.detailAria: Preview of a spring detail in Studánky

hero.titleLine1: Stop hauling litres on your back.
hero.titleLine2: Route your trip past a spring.
hero.description: Studánky shows where water is flowing right now — from CHMI measurements, refreshed every night. Check the map, plan your route past water, and leave the spare bottle at home.
hero.qrNote: Point your camera at the code
hero.qrAlt: QR code to download the Studánky app
hero.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water.

lines: An extra litre of water is an extra kilo on your back.
Maps show you the spring. Whether it flows, they won't say.
And the last review? "Lovely spot." Three years ago.

bento.title: What the app does
bento.description: No accounts, no route planners, no ads. Just a map that knows where water flows.

map.title: Flowing? Dry? See it instantly
map.text: Every spring carries its state — readable at a glance, and not by colour alone.

freshness.title: Straight about old data
freshness.text: If nobody has checked for 14 days, we say "we don't know". A stale "flowing" is worse than none.

history.title: Measurement history
history.text: How does a spring hold up through summer? Flow over time tells you which ones to trust.

navigate.title: Navigate in one tap
navigate.text: You plan routes your way — we just hand the spring to Mapy, Google, or whoever you like.

favorites.title: Favourites
favorites.text: The one below the ridge, the one by the cabin. Springs you return to, one tap away.

share.title: Pass it on
share.text: A spring link opens right in your friends' app. This code, by the way, leads to ours.

showcase.title: What the app looks like
showcase.description: Search, pins, detail — like the maps you're used to. Just water-blue and readable in direct sun.
showcase.note: Illustrative interface — the final app may differ.

map.title: Map
map.caption: Three marker states and place search.

detail.title: Spring detail
detail.caption: Status, data age, and history together.

steps.title: How it works
steps.description: Studánky doesn't plan routes — it's your eyes in the field. You plan where you always have.

items.title: Open the map
items.description: Where's the trip headed? And which springs are on the way?

items.title: Check the status
items.description: Flowing, dry — and when someone last looked.

items.title: Head out
items.description: Send the spring to your navigation and refill along the way.

data.title: Data from CHMI measurements
data.description: Spring status comes from regular measurements by the Czech Hydrometeorological Institute. We fetch it every night so your morning planning holds up.

stats.label: springs measured by CHMI across Czechia

data.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water. Studánky reports the measured flow; it does not verify water safety — use at your own risk.

roadmap.title: Where we're headed
roadmap.description: We're starting with the springs CHMI measures. The goal is bigger: a living map updated by hikers themselves. People helping people.

phases.title: Map with CHMI measurements
phases.description: About 300 springs, flow and measurement history. Fresh data every night.

phases.title: Reports straight from the springs
phases.description: A stainless QR code at the spring: scan it, tap "flowing" — and help everyone who arrives after you. Works offline too.

phases.title: Points for revived springs
phases.description: The longer a spring has gone unreported, the more points a fresh report earns. Trips get a mission.

newsletter.title: Want to know when we move?
newsletter.description: An occasional email when we ship something new. No spam — we have an app to build.
newsletter.success: Thanks! We'll be in touch when there's something to show.
newsletter.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
newsletter.privacyNote: We'll only use your email for Studánky updates. Unsubscribe in one click.

community.title: People helping people
community.description: Studánky runs on a simple exchange: you plan your trip by other people's reports — and next time you're the one reporting whether the water flows. No company behind it. Just people who go outside.

points.title: Pass it on
points.description: The biggest help? Share Studánky with the people you go outside with. The more of us, the fresher the map.

points.title: Know a spring?
points.description: Missing from the map, or listed wrong? Let us know.

points.title: Want to do more?
points.description: Spreading the word, ideas, marketing, code — the app and this site are open. Reach out; every pair of hands counts.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.description: Short and straight — money, data, drinkability.

items.question: Is the app free?
items.answer: Yes. The app is free, with no sign-up and no ads. Studánky is a community open source project.

items.question: Is spring water drinkable?
items.answer: We don't know and we don't claim to. We only show whether water flow has been reported — nobody verifies safety. Tasting it is your call and your responsibility.

items.question: Where does the data come from?
items.answer: From open data of the Czech Hydrometeorological Institute, which regularly measures flow at roughly 300 springs across the country. We fetch it every night and put it on the map.

items.question: What does "outdated" mean?
items.answer: The latest measurement is over 14 days old. Things may have changed since, so we say so plainly instead of claiming a stale "flowing" or "dry".

items.question: Can I report a spring's status myself?
items.answer: Not yet — reports via QR codes right at the springs are coming in the next phase. Leave us your email and we'll tell you when it launches.

items.question: Does the app work offline?
items.answer: The map needs a connection — you'll use it most at home while planning anyway. An offline mode is planned for future field reporting.

download.title: Get Studánky
download.description: For iPhone and Android. Free and ad-free.
download.qrNote: The code takes you straight to the download.
download.qrAlt: QR code to download the Studánky app
download.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water.

footer.tagline: Made with love for the Czech landscape.
footer.disclaimer: Flowing water does not mean drinkable water. The app does not verify water safety; use at your own risk.

common.disclaimer: We keep this information up to date as the app evolves.

privacy.metaDescription: How Studánky handles personal data, location, Mapy.com services, the newsletter, and technical logs.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: A short, plain-language summary. The app has no account, ads, or analytics. It may use on-device location and Mapy.com services for the map, so we describe them here.

items.label: Operator
items.text: [FULL NAME / BUSINESS NAME], ID number: [ID NUMBER], registered address: [ADDRESS].

items.label: Contact
items.text: [EMAIL]

sections.title: In short
bullets: The app does not require registration or an account.
We do not use ads, analytics, tracking, or crash reporting.
Location is used only after system permission and stays on your device.
The app is read-only: you do not submit your own content or spring status.
Favourite springs stay stored locally on your device.

items.label: Location
items.text: Optional. After system permission, the app uses location only to show your current position and center the map. Location stays on your device and is not sent to the operator or backend. Legal basis: consent. Retention by the operator: none. Deletion: turn off location permission in device settings.

items.label: Favourite springs
items.text: Optional. Favourites are stored only on your device. Legal basis: providing the feature you chose to use. Retention: until you delete them in the app, clear app data, or uninstall the app. Recipients: none, unless we add sync later.

items.label: Map and search
items.text: Part of the core feature. Map tiles, autocomplete, and search are provided by Mapy.com / Seznam.cz. These services may receive your IP address, technical request data, search query, map tile requests, and visible map viewport. If you center the map on your location, tile or viewport requests may indirectly correspond to the area where you are. In its Mapy.com rules, Seznam.cz states that the service also processes statistical, technical, and user-activity data.

items.label: App backend and API
items.text: The app loads public spring data from our backend. Our own application backend does not store IP address, GPS location, map viewport/bbox, or technical request logs from the mobile app. Any bbox is used only immediately to return the response and is not retained. Infrastructure layers such as hosting, reverse proxy, or CDN may, depending on configuration, process technical access logs for [INFRASTRUCTURE LOG RETENTION / NOT STORED].

items.label: Server logs
items.text: For operation and security, we may briefly keep IP address, request time, requested URL, user-agent, and response status. Legal basis: legitimate interest in operating and securing the website. Retention period: [WEB LOG RETENTION, e.g. 30 days].

items.label: Newsletter
items.text: Optional. If you subscribe to project updates, we store your email, signup time, and related consent. Legal basis: consent. Retention: until unsubscribe and then [CONSENT EVIDENCE RETENTION]. The newsletter is not a mobile app account.

items.label: Form protection
items.text: To protect the newsletter form against abuse, the website briefly processes a hash of the IP address for rate limiting. This is not analytics or tracking. Retention: at most 24 hours or until the process restarts.

items.label: Website language
items.text: The website uses the technical NEXT_LOCALE cookie to remember language choice and local storage to keep the Android banner hidden after dismissal. Legal basis: legitimate interest in making the website work properly. This is not analytics or advertising.

items.label: Hosting and backend
items.text: [HOSTING / BACKEND PROVIDER] helps operate the website, backend, and infrastructure. Role: [PROCESSOR / INDEPENDENT CONTROLLER]. Processing country: [COUNTRY]. Transfer outside the EU/EEA: [NO / YES, COUNTRY AND MECHANISM].

items.label: Mapy.com / Seznam.cz
items.text: Map tiles, search, and autocomplete are loaded from Mapy.com / Seznam.cz servers. Seznam.cz acts as an independent controller for its map services and processes data under its own Mapy.com privacy rules.

items.label: Newsletter
items.text: [NEWSLETTER / STRAPI BACKEND PROVIDER] helps store and manage newsletter subscriptions. Role: [PROCESSOR / INDEPENDENT CONTROLLER]. Processing country: [COUNTRY]. Transfer outside the EU/EEA: [NO / YES, COUNTRY AND MECHANISM].

items.label: Legal obligations
items.text: We may disclose data to public authorities or legal advisers if required by law or to protect the project's rights.

sections.title: Deletion and choices
paragraphs: You can change location permission anytime in device settings. Local favourites can be deleted in the app, by clearing app data, or by uninstalling the app.

We delete newsletter data after unsubscribe or a request to [EMAIL]. Website technical logs are deleted automatically after the stated retention period. If you need anything else deleted, contact [EMAIL].

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: You can request access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, or object to processing where the legal conditions are met. Contact us at [EMAIL].
You may also lodge a complaint with the Czech Office for Personal Data Protection.

links.label: Czech Office for Personal Data Protection

sections.title: Changes
paragraphs: If we make new features available that handle additional data, we will update this page before release. The current version is always here.

terms.metaDescription: Terms for using the Studánky app and website, including water safety, maps, and source data licences.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: Rules for using the Studánky app and studankyapp.cz. The service is free and reports water flow, not water drinkability.

sections.title: What Studánky is
paragraphs: The operator is [FULL NAME / BUSINESS NAME], ID number: [ID NUMBER], email: [EMAIL].
Studánky is a free informational service for mobile devices and the web. It shows springs, water flow, a map, and related project information.

sections.title: Important note about water
paragraphs: The app reports water flow or spring yield. It does not say whether the water is drinkable or safe.
We do not verify water quality. Any decision to use water is yours and at your own risk. A source can change faster than the data in the app.

sections.title: Map and location
paragraphs: Studánky is not a health, hygiene, navigation, rescue, or safety service. Treat it as a helpful map, not as your only source of decisions outdoors.
Location is used only to orient you on the map and center the map if you allow it in system settings.

items.label: CHMI data
items.text: Spring yield data comes from open data of the Czech Hydrometeorological Institute under the CC BY 4.0 licence. For the app, it is modified and simplified. CHMI does not operate or approve the app.

items.label: Mapy.com
items.text: Map tiles and search are provided by Seznam.cz, a.s. as Mapy.com. Do not copy, store, scrape, pre-cache, or redistribute map tiles or API function results unless Mapy.com terms allow it.

items.label: App and website
items.text: Original copy, design, databases, and other project parts belong to the operator unless stated otherwise.

sections.title: Fair use
bullets: Do not use the service in a way that overloads or disrupts it.
Do not bulk-download map or other data outside normal app use.
Do not misuse links or future community features to provide false information.

sections.title: Changes and availability
paragraphs: The service is provided as is. We may change, suspend, or end it, especially for operational, security, licensing, or legal reasons.

sections.title: Law and disputes
paragraphs: Legal relationships are governed by the law of the Czech Republic. Consumers may use out-of-court consumer dispute resolution through the Czech Trade Inspection Authority.

dataSources.metaDescription: Attribution for CHMI data, the CC BY 4.0 licence, and Mapy.com map data used by Studánky.
dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: Where the data and map come from, in plain terms.

sections.title: Spring flow data
paragraphs: Source: Czech Hydrometeorological Institute (CHMI), open data.
Licence: Creative Commons BY 4.0.
We modify the data for the app: aggregate it, simplify it, and convert it into flowing / not flowing / outdated states.
CHMI does not operate, endorse, or approve this app.

sections.title: Map and search
paragraphs: Map tiles and selected map services are provided by Seznam.cz, a.s. under the Mapy.com brand.
Mapy.com attribution belongs directly next to the map and must stay visible.
When using search or autocomplete, the app may communicate with Mapy.com / Seznam.cz services.

sections.title: What follows from that
bullets: Map tiles and API function results must not be stored outside authorised use.
Service data must not be scraped, pre-cached, or bulk-exported.
The app must use its own API key and protect it against misuse.
